'''Brinkan''' was [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Tragan Cluster/Legends|Tragan sector]], in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Moff Brinkan placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on [[Ral Shawgrim]], an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]] who attempted to steal technical data and failed to deliver it to the Empire.<ref name="AJ1" />
